Services

Microsoft 365 & Identity Automation

End-to-end identity lifecycle automation for Microsoft 365 environments — from user onboarding to cross-system integration, licence governance, and compliance reporting.

Identity is the perimeter of the modern workplace. Every access control, every collaboration boundary, every compliance requirement traces back to whether your identity systems are accurate, current, and governed. In most organisations, they aren't — because they were built to be managed manually, and manual management doesn't scale.

We build automation that makes Microsoft 365 identity management systematic and self-correcting. HR systems become the authoritative source. Events in one system trigger the right actions in all others. Licences are allocated and reclaimed automatically. Exceptions are surfaced for human review, not buried in backlogs. The result is an identity estate that stays clean without requiring daily IT intervention.

What we deliver

M365 automation capabilities

User lifecycle management

Fully automated onboarding and offboarding driven by your HR system or Active Directory events. New starters get the right accounts, licences, group memberships, and access from day one — leavers are cleanly offboarded with nothing left behind.

Identity governance & Entra ID

Rule-driven identity policies enforced across Microsoft Entra ID: group memberships, conditional access, MFA requirements, named locations, and role assignments — all managed systematically rather than manually.

Cross-system integration

Connect Microsoft 365 to the rest of your business: HR platforms (Oracle HCM, Workday, SAP), ITSM tools (ServiceNow, Jira Service Management), finance systems, and Active Directory — so identity events flow automatically across all systems.

Multi-brand & multi-entity organisations

Organisations with multiple legal entities, brands, or geographic divisions get identity management that handles the complexity of different naming conventions, licence pools, distribution lists, and access policies per entity.

Licence management & cost control

Automated licence assignment based on role, department, or group membership — with regular reclamation of unused licences. Microsoft 365 licence spend is one of the easiest costs to reduce with the right automation in place.

Reporting & operational dashboards

Visibility into your Microsoft 365 environment: inactive accounts, licence utilisation, guest access exposure, MFA adoption, and mailbox usage — all surfaced in reports your IT team and management can actually use.

Alerting & anomaly detection

Proactive alerting for conditions that matter: sign-ins from unusual locations, disabled accounts with active delegations, licences expiring, or groups that have grown beyond expected membership.

Audit trail & compliance

Complete audit logs of every automated action, permission change, and licence assignment. Essential for organisations under ISO 27001, SOC 2, or government compliance frameworks.

Integrations

Systems we connect to

M365 automation doesn't exist in a vacuum. The value comes from connecting it to the systems your organisation already runs. We build the integration layer that keeps identity in sync across all of them.

Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD)Active Directory (on-premises)Exchange Online / mailboxesSharePoint OnlineMicrosoft TeamsMicrosoft IntuneOracle HCMSAP SuccessFactorsWorkdayServiceNowJira Service ManagementCustom HR & payroll systems
Modern workplace

Bridging legacy and new

Most organisations don't have a clean Microsoft 365 environment standing alone. They have a hybrid of on-premises Active Directory, Entra ID Connect sync, Exchange Online coexisting with on-premises Exchange, HR systems that were never designed to talk to an identity provider, and a decade of manual processes that nobody has had time to automate.

We work in this hybrid reality. We understand the sync latency and attribute precedence rules in Entra Connect. We know how to drive automation against Exchange Online without breaking hybrid mail flow. We know how to extract data from HR systems that expose CSV exports rather than APIs and make them the reliable trigger for identity events.

The goal is not to require a clean-room migration before you can automate. It's to meet your environment where it is and make it progressively better — reducing manual work, reducing error, and reducing the cost of running identity at scale.

Case Study · Enterprise / Retail

Microsoft 365 Identity Automation

Fully automated, rule-driven identity management for approximately 2,100 employees across multiple brands in Australia and New Zealand. Zero daily manual IT intervention required — onboarding, offboarding, and access changes all driven by HR events.

Microsoft 365 Entra ID Active Directory PowerShell
